title: Integrate a native module safely
description: Add a native addon by matching it to Electron's ABI, rebuilding for the target, and isolating its failure modes.
body: Steps: 1. Prefer an N-API/prebuilt module so it is ABI-stable across Node/Electron versions. 2. If it compiles against the Node ABI, rebuild it for the app's exact Electron version (electron-rebuild) per target platform/arch. 3. Verify the build for each shipped platform (macOS arm64/x64, Windows, Linux). 4. Load the module in the main or a utility process, not an untrusted renderer, and guard against load failure. 5. Add a smoke test that loads and calls it on each platform in CI. Rollback point: before upgrading Electron (may break the native ABI). Validation: the module loads and runs on every target platform without ABI errors; a module built against the system Node but loaded in Electron is the mismatch this prevents.
